title: Design System: Céu de Lanternas (Sky of Lanterns)

display.purpose: Couple's names in the hero only.

body.purpose: All functional copy: descriptions, form text, gift copy.

label.purpose: Small uppercase kicker above section titles.

shadows.name: glow-gold
shadows.purpose: Default emphasis glow: focus rings, badges, active dots.

shadows.name: glow-gold-strong
shadows.purpose: Hero-level emphasis on names and primary lantern.

shadows.name: shadow-card
shadows.purpose: Standard card lift against the night backdrop.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Gold gradient CTA with a light-sweep hover shimmer.
components.css: .ds-btn-gold { font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; font-size: 0.95rem; padding: 0.95rem 1.9rem; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0d49a, #d8a94a 60%, #bd8a33); color: #2a1c06; box-shadow: 0 12px 32px -12px rgba(216, 169, 74, 0.7), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.4); transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1), box-shadow 0.35s; } .ds-btn-gold:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 18px 44px -12px rgba(255,207,134,0.85), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.5); } .ds-btn-gold:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(230,193,120,0.5); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-gold:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Frosted secondary button used alongside the gold CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; font-size: 0.95rem; padding: 0.95rem 1.9rem; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #f6ecd3; border: 1px solid rgba(230,193,120,0.22); backdrop-filter: blur(6px); transition: transform 0.35s, box-shadow 0.35s, color 0.35s, border-color 0.35s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); border-color: #e6c178; box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(230,193,120,0.45); color: #f6e3b4; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(230,193,120,0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: RSVP form input: dark translucent field with gold focus halo.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #c4b3ec; } .ds-input { font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #f6ecd3; background: rgba(8,11,34,0.5); border: 1px solid rgba(196,179,236,0.22); border-radius: 12px; padding: 0.85rem 1rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s, background 0.3s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(185,176,212,0.5); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #e6c178; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(230,193,120,0.16), 0 0 30px rgba(230,193,120,0.45); background: rgba(8,11,34,0.75); }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Frosted panel floating over the night backdrop; base surface for most content blocks.
components.css: .ds-glass { background: rgba(18,22,56,0.55); border: 1px solid rgba(230,193,120,0.22); border-radius: 22px; backdrop-filter: blur(14px); box-shadow: 0 24px 60px -24px rgba(5,7,26,0.85); padding: 1.5rem; color: #f4ecd8; }

components.name: Gift Card
components.description: Registry item card with icon, description, value, and a discreet 'give' link.
components.html:
★

Jantar de conto de fadas

Um jantar romântico à luz de velas.

R$ 250
components.css: .ds-gift-card { border-radius: 14px; padding: 1.9rem 1.7rem; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.022); border: 1px solid rgba(230,193,120,0.14); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.55rem; transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1), border-color 0.4s, background 0.4s; } .ds-gift-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); border-color: rgba(230,193,120,0.42); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.045); } .ds-gift-icon { width: 46px; height: 46px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid rgba(230,193,120,0.28); color: #f0d49a; } .ds-gift-title { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.16rem; color: #f6ecd3; margin: 0; } .ds-gift-desc { color: #b9b0d4; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.6; flex: 1; margin: 0; } .ds-gift-foot { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 1rem; padding-top: 1rem; border-top: 1px solid rgba(230,193,120,0.1); } .ds-gift-value { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 500; color: #f0d49a; } .ds-gift-give { background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; color: #f0d49a; font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color 0.3s; } .ds-gift-give:hover { color: #f6e3b4; }

components.name: Navbar
components.description: Fixed nav that goes from transparent to a frosted gold-bordered bar on scroll.
components.html:
Tiago & Gabriela
  • História
  • RSVP
components.css: .ds-navbar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0.8rem 2rem; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; transition: background 0.4s, border-color 0.4s; } .ds-navbar-scrolled { background: rgba(8,11,34,0.72); backdrop-filter: blur(14px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(230,193,120,0.22); } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 1.15rem; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #f6ecd3; text-decoration: none; } .ds-amp { color: #e6c178; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.3rem; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-links a { font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.86rem; color: #b9b0d4; text-decoration: none; padding: 0.5rem 0.85rem; border-radius: 999px; transition: color 0.3s; } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: #f6e3b4; } .ds-nav-cta { color: #2a1c06 !important; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0d49a, #d8a94a); font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 8px 22px -10px rgba(216,169,74,0.7); }

narrative.northStar: A storybook told under a starlit sky, lit by candle-gold.
narrative.overview: The site is one continuous night scene: a deep starfield backdrop sits behind every section, and candle-gold light — from lanterns, glow effects, and gold gradients — is the one warm element that cuts through the dark. The couple's story is literally told as a page-turning storybook component (.book), reinforcing the "chapters" framing already present in the copy (Capítulo I–IV). Per PRODUCT.md, this reads as elegant and formal first, with the lantern/storybook motifs as a romantic accent thread rather than the dominant register — whimsy supports the occasion, it doesn't override its formality.
keyCharacteristics: Deep night-sky base with a twinkling star field, never flat black
Candle-gold as the singular accent, carried through glows, gradients, and borders
Cinzel (display) + Cormorant Garamond italic (script accent) + Jost (body)
Pill-shaped buttons and soft-radius glass cards; nothing sharp-cornered
Glow-based elevation instead of hard shadows for emphasis

rules.name: The Single Accent Rule
rules.body: Gold is the only color that means "light" or "action." If a new element needs emphasis, reach for gold-400/500 and a glow, not a new hue.

rules.name: The Ceremonial Caps Rule
rules.body: Cinzel is reserved for names, section titles, and storybook chapter titles — never for body copy or UI labels.

rules.name: The Glow-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Emphasis reads as light (gold glow), not as a gray drop shadow. A component floating over the night sky should look lit from within.

dos: Do keep gold (gold-400/gold-500) as the only active/important color — buttons, focus states, glows, badges.
Do use glow-based emphasis (glow-gold, shadow-card) rather than plain gray drop shadows.
Do reserve Cinzel for names, section titles, and chapter titles; keep Jost for all functional/body text.
Do default to pill-shaped buttons and soft-radius (12-22px) cards.
Do treat the storybook motif and lantern imagery as an accent layer over an otherwise elegant, formal composition.
donts: Don't introduce a second accent hue competing with gold; rose is reserved strictly for negative/error states.
Don't flatten the background to solid black or plain white; the night gradient + star field is load-bearing.
Don't use sharp 0px corners or hard gray box-shadows.
Don't set body copy in Cinzel or the script italic; both are accent/display faces only.
Don't let the storybook/lantern whimsy overwhelm the page — this is a formal church wedding, not a children's fairy tale site.
